diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support for Genshin Impact. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I was looking at the Welkin Moon and I wanted to know exactly what it gives you.
[Agent] Great question! The Blessing of the Welkin Moon is a 30-day package. When you purchase it, you immediately receive 300 Genesis Crystals, and then every day for 30 days you can log in and claim 90 Primogems as a daily reward. That's 2700 Primogems over the full 30 days, on top of the initial Genesis Crystals.
[Caller] So it's basically the best value pack in the game?
[Agent] It's widely considered one of the highest value purchases, yes. The Welkin Moon retails for 4.99 US dollars, and the total currency value across the 30 days works out to roughly 3000 Primogems plus the initial Genesis Crystals. It stacks too, so if you buy another one while active, the new 30-day period is added to your existing subscription.
[Caller] Perfect, that's exactly what I needed to know. Thanks!
[Agent] You're very welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with today?
[Caller] No, that's it.
[Agent] Have a wonderful adventure in Teyvat!
